tasks.command: python3 -m pytest -q tests && bash tests/run_functional_tests.sh && bash tests/run_integration_tests.sh && bash tests/run_acceptance_tests.sh && bash tests/run_full_acceptance_tests.sh && bash tests/leakage_scanner.sh

tasks.label: final-test-verification-conda
tasks.command: /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/bin/python3 -m pytest -q tests && bash tests/run_functional_tests.sh && bash tests/run_integration_tests.sh && bash tests/run_acceptance_tests.sh && bash tests/run_full_acceptance_tests.sh && bash tests/leakage_scanner.sh

tasks.label: rebuild-graphify
tasks.command: /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/bin/python3 -c "from graphify.watch import _rebuild_code; from pathlib import Path; _rebuild_code(Path('.'))"
